items.name: Opabinia Head
items.description:
👤 This is a user-suggested item.

Why look for aliens in space when we have our very own dwelling within Earth's oceans? The opabinia is an extinct arthropod with an unusual odd number of eyes. In spite of its creepy creature-features, some of you are sure to find it to be an oddly cute creature.
